subcodes.first_line: O esteemed one, render thanks unto God for having sustained thee in turning to the Word of God and being enkindled with the fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المحترمه اشکری الله بما ایدک علی الاقبال علی کلمه الله و الاشتعال بالنار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital
